title: Various Items of Information
description: In this year, the governor of Mecca and Medina for Muhammad b. Harun was Dawud b. Isa b. Musa b. Muhammad b. All b. `Abdallah b. Abbas. It was he who led the pilgrimage in this year and in the two years preceding-193 and 194. Al-`Abbas b. Musa al-Hidi was governor of al-Kufah for Muhammad. Manqur b. al-Mahdi was governor of al-Ba*rah for Muhammad. Al-Ma'mun was in Khurasan; his brother Muhammad was in Baghdad 351 35o. The word suq ("market ") is frequent in military metaphors.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
